title: 5 Workflows You'll Love (Webinar)
excerpt: Save your spot for our community mega event on Thursday, March 6th from 10am - 12pm ET. Discover five favorite workflows to help your team achieve shared goals. See how these workflows drive success, connect with monday.…

posts.author: amybronstein (Amy Bronstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Save your spot for our community mega event on Thursday, March 6th from 10am - 12pm ET. Discover five favorite workflows to help your team achieve shared goals. See how these workflows drive success, connect with monday.com fans, and enjoy an immersive virtual experience in the monday mansion!

Sign up here

*About a week prior to the event we will follow up with details and instructions on entering the monday mansion!
